arts.ttl: Michael Stewart has 'got a feeling' Celtic are about to replace Kyogo Furuhashi, namechecks player
arts.sum: However, Michael Stewart has said that he feels Celtic are ‘pretty confident’ about replacing Kyogo and namechecks one player who has long been linked to the club. “Kyogo is 30 years old now,” continued Stewart, “He wants another challenge, all of a sudden you’re thinking about Celtic 18 months ago when Brendan Rodgers came back in and the disaster they had in the transfer window, to now what they’ve started to do.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins to Arsenal transfer shock as Aston Villa respond
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reportedly turned down a £60m bid from Arsenal for Ollie Watkins . Aston Villa news from BirminghamLive as Arsenal make surprise bid for Ollie Watkins

arts.ttl: Official | Bayer Leverkusen sign Emiliano Buendia on loan with €20m purchase option
arts.sum: Bayer 04 Leverkusen have officially acquired Argentine international Emiliano Buendia on loan.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers issues Celtic response to Sondre Orjasaeter transfer link
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has insisted he is "not aware" of any Celtic transfer bid for Sarpsborg winger Sondre Orjasaeter.

arts.ttl: What Aston Villa star Jacob Ramsey said about Brendan Rodgers and why Celtic Champions League clash will be 'intense'
arts.sum: Villa also like to play their game on the front foot but Ramsey feels the hosts will also look to dominate the ball. “We don’t like to play that basketball game to be fair.

arts.ttl: 'Nearly there': Rodgers reflects on failing to sign John McGinn for Celtic
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers has reflected on failing to sign John McGinn during his first spell at the club.

arts.ttl: 'Official': Fabrizio Romano says what he knows about Arsenal and Ollie Watkins after £60m bid was made

arts.ttl: Alex Valle bids Celtic farewell in Instagram statement, Hoops stars react
arts.sum: Alex Valle shared a heartfelt goodbye with Celtic fans But that has not stopped the 20-year-old from enjoying every minute of his time as a Celtic player where he made his Champions League debut and provided THAT assist in a mauling of St Johnstone.
